◆ compute_Nhalos_in_PLC()

double compute_Nhalos_in_PLC ( double  z1,
double  z2 
)

Definition at line 935 of file fragment.c.

936{
937 /* analytic prediction of the number of halos in the PLC */
938
939 double MinMass = log(params.ParticleMass * params.MinHaloMass);
940 double delta_z = 0.01;
941 double number = 0;
942 double solidangle = (1 - cos((params.PLCAperture > 90. ? 90. : params.PLCAperture) / 180. * PI)) * 2. * PI;
943
944 double result, error, upper, lower;
945 gsl_function Function;
946
947 Function.function = &Integrand_MF;
948 lower = z1;
949 do
950 {
951 upper = lower + delta_z;
952 if (upper > z2)
953 upper = z2;
954 myz = 0.5 * (upper + lower);
955
956 gsl_integration_qags(&Function, MinMass, 37.0, 0.0, TOLERANCE, NWINT, workspace, &result, &error);
957
958 number += result * solidangle * (pow(ComovingDistance(upper), 3.) - pow(ComovingDistance(lower), 3.)) / 3.;
959 lower += delta_z;
960 } while (upper < z2);
961
962 return number;
963}
ComovingDistance
double ComovingDistance(double z)

◆ count_peaks()

int count_peaks ( int *  ngood)

Definition at line 618 of file fragment.c.

619{
620
621 /* counts the number of Fmax peaks down to the final redshift
622 to know the total number of groups */
623
624 int iz, i, j, k, nn, ngroups_tot, peak_cond, i1, j1, k1;
625
626#ifdef DEBUG
627 FILE *fd = fopen("peaks.dat", "w");
628#endif
629
630 ngroups_tot = 0; /* number of groups, group 1 is the filament group */
631 *ngood = 0; /* number of groups out of the safety boundary */
632
633 for (iz = 0; iz < subbox.Nstored; iz++)
634 {
635 /* position on the local box */
636#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
637 INDEX_TO_COORD(iz, i, j, k, subbox.Lgwbl);
638#else
639 INDEX_TO_COORD(frag_pos[iz], i, j, k, subbox.Lgwbl);
640#endif
641
642 /* avoid borders */
643 if (!subbox.pbc[_x_] && (i == 0 || i == subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - 1))
644 continue;
645 if (!subbox.pbc[_y_] && (j == 0 || j == subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - 1))
646 continue;
647 if (!subbox.pbc[_z_] && (k == 0 || k == subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - 1))
648 continue;
649
650 /* peak condition */
651 peak_cond = 1;
652 for (nn = 0; nn < 6; nn++)
653 {
654 switch (nn)
655 {
656 case 0:
657 i1 = (subbox.pbc[_x_] && i == 0 ? subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - 1 : i - 1);
658 j1 = j;
659 k1 = k;
660 break;
661 case 1:
662 i1 = (subbox.pbc[_x_] && i == subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - 1 ? 0 : i + 1);
663 j1 = j;
664 k1 = k;
665 break;
666 case 2:
667 i1 = i;
668 j1 = (subbox.pbc[_y_] && j == 0 ? subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - 1 : j - 1);
669 k1 = k;
670 break;
671 case 3:
672 i1 = i;
673 j1 = (subbox.pbc[_y_] && j == subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - 1 ? 0 : j + 1);
674 k1 = k;
675 break;
676 case 4:
677 i1 = i;
678 j1 = j;
679 k1 = (subbox.pbc[_z_] && k == 0 ? subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - 1 : k - 1);
680 break;
681 case 5:
682 i1 = i;
683 j1 = j;
684 k1 = (subbox.pbc[_z_] && k == subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - 1 ? 0 : k + 1);
685 break;
686 }
687
688#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
689 peak_cond &= (frag[iz].Fmax > frag[COORD_TO_INDEX(i1, j1, k1, subbox.Lgwbl)].Fmax);
690#else
691 /* looks for the neighbouring particle in the list */
692 int pos = find_location(i1, j1, k1);
693 if (pos >= 0)
694 peak_cond &= (frag[iz].Fmax > frag[indices[pos]].Fmax);
695#endif
696
697 if (!peak_cond)
698 break;
699 }
700
701 if (peak_cond)
702 {
703 ngroups_tot++;
704 if (i >= subbox.safe[_x_] && i < subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - subbox.safe[_x_] &&
705 j >= subbox.safe[_y_] && j < subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - subbox.safe[_y_] &&
706 k >= subbox.safe[_z_] && k < subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - subbox.safe[_z_])
707 (*ngood)++;
708#ifdef DEBUG
709 fprintf(fd, " %2d %2d %2d %12.10f\n", i, j, k, frag[iz].Fmax);
710#endif
711 }
712 }
713
714#ifdef DEBUG
715 fclose(fd);
716#endif
717
718 return ngroups_tot;
719}
find_location
int find_location(int i, int j, int k)

722{
723 int i, j, k, i1, i2, j1, j2, k1, k2;
724
725 /* sets to 1 all particles in the well-resolved region plus one row for each side (without PBCs) */
726 memset(frag_map_update, 0, subbox.maplength * sizeof(unsigned int));
727 if (!subbox.pbc[_x_])
728 {
729 i1 = subbox.safe[_x_] - 1;
730 i2 = subbox.Lgrid[_x_] + subbox.safe[_x_] + 1;
731 }
732 else
733 {
734 i1 = 0;
735 i2 = subbox.Lgrid[_x_];
736 }
737 if (!subbox.pbc[_y_])
738 {
739 j1 = subbox.safe[_y_] - 1;
740 j2 = subbox.Lgrid[_y_] + subbox.safe[_y_] + 1;
741 }
742 else
743 {
744 j1 = 0;
745 j2 = subbox.Lgrid[_y_];
746 }
747 if (!subbox.pbc[_z_])
748 {
749 k1 = subbox.safe[_z_] - 1;
750 k2 = subbox.Lgrid[_z_] + subbox.safe[_z_] + 1;
751 }
752 else
753 {
754 k1 = 0;
755 k2 = subbox.Lgrid[_z_];
756 }
757
758 for (i = i1; i < i2; i++)
759 for (j = j1; j < j2; j++)
760 for (k = k1; k < k2; k++)
761 set_mapup_bit(i, j, k);
762
763 return 0;
764}

◆ estimate_file_size()

int estimate_file_size ( void  )

Definition at line 977 of file fragment.c.

978{
979
980 /* estimates the size of output files */
981
982 /* only Task 0 needs to work here */
983 if (ThisTask)
984 return 0;
985
986 /* this works for binary output */
987 if (params.CatalogInAscii)
988 return 0;
989
990 double result, error, total = 0.0, size, number;
991 int gb;
992 gsl_function Function;
993
994 printf("ESTIMATED STORAGE REQUIREMENTS:\n");
995
996 double MinMass = log(params.ParticleMass * params.MinHaloMass);
997 Function.function = &Integrand_MF;
998 for (int iout = 0; iout < outputs.n; iout++)
999 {
1000
1001 myz = outputs.z[iout];
1002 gsl_integration_qags(&Function, MinMass, 37.0, 0.0, TOLERANCE, NWINT, workspace, &result, &error);
1003 number = result * pow(params.BoxSize_htrue, 3.);
1004 size = number * sizeof(catalog_data);
1005 total += size;
1006 gb = size2Mb(&size);
1007 printf("catalog, z=%6.4f, number of halos: %d, size: %f %s", outputs.z[iout], (int)number, size, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1008 if (params.NumFiles > 1)
1009 printf(" - each file will have a size of %f %s", size / (double)params.NumFiles, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1010 printf("\n");
1011 }
1012
1013 size = number * sizeof(catalog_data) * 1.4;
1014 total += size;
1015 gb = size2Mb(&size);
1016 printf("order-of-magnitude size of histories file: %f %s", 1.4 * size, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1017 if (params.NumFiles > 1)
1018 printf(" - each file will have a size of %f %s", size / (double)params.NumFiles, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1019 printf("\n");
1020
1021#ifdef PLC
1022
1023 if (params.StartingzForPLC > 0.)
1024 {
1025 number = compute_Nhalos_in_PLC(params.LastzForPLC, params.StartingzForPLC);
1026 size = number * sizeof(plc_write_data);
1027 total += size;
1028 gb = size2Mb(&size);
1029 printf("past light cone, number of halos: %d, size: %f %s", (int)number, size, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1030 if (params.NumFiles > 1)
1031 printf(" - each file will have a size of %f %s", size / (double)params.NumFiles, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1032 printf("\n");
1033 }
1034#endif
1035
1036#ifdef LONGIDS
1037 double IDsize = (double)MyGrids[0].Ntotal * 8.;
1038#else
1039 double IDsize = (double)MyGrids[0].Ntotal * 4.;
1040#endif
1041
1042 int nblo = 3;
1043#ifndef TWO_LPT
1044 int nvel = 3;
1045 nblo += 1;
1046#else
1047#ifndef THREE_LPT
1048 int nvel = 6;
1049 nblo += 2;
1050#else
1051 int nvel = 12;
1052 nblo += 4;
1053#endif
1054#endif
1055
1056#ifdef ADD_RMAX_TO_SNAPSHOT
1057 nblo += 1;
1058#endif
1059
1060 if (params.WriteTimelessSnapshot)
1061 {
1062 size = 268. + IDsize + 6. + (nvel + 2) * ((double)MyGrids[0].Ntotal * sizeof(float) + 6.) + nblo * 40 + 6.;
1063#ifdef ADD_RMAX_TO_SNAPSHOT
1064 size += ((double)MyGrids[0].Ntotal * sizeof(float) + 6.);
1065#endif
1066 total += size;
1067 gb = size2Mb(&size);
1068 printf("timeless snapshot size: %f %s", size, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1069 if (params.NumFiles > 1)
1070 printf(" - each file will have a size of %f %s", size / (double)params.NumFiles, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1071 printf("\n");
1072 }
1073
1074 gb = size2Mb(&total);
1075
1076 printf("Total storage: %f %s\n", total, (gb ? "Gbyte" : "Mbyte"));
1077
1078 return 0;
1079}

606{
607 /* this function finds the location in the frag and frag_pos vectors of a given particle */
608
609 int pos = COORD_TO_INDEX(i, j, k, subbox.Lgwbl);
610 // i + (j + k*subbox.Lgwbl[_y_])*subbox.Lgwbl[_x_];
611 int *nn = bsearch((void *)&pos, (void *)sorted_pos, (size_t)subbox.Nstored, sizeof(int), compare_search);
612 if (nn != 0x0)
613 return nn - sorted_pos;
614 else
615 return -1; /* if the particle is not stored, it returns -1 */

◆ fragment()

int fragment ( void  )

Definition at line 159 of file fragment.c.

160{
161 /* This function is the driver for fragmentation of collapsed medium
162 and construction of halo catalogs */
163
164 int Npeaks, Ngood;
165#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
166 unsigned int nadd[2];
167#endif
168 double BestPredPeakFactor;
169 unsigned long long mynadd[2], nadd_all[2];
170 double tmp;
171
172 /* timing */
173 cputime.frag = MPI_Wtime();
174 cputime.group = cputime.sort = cputime.distr = 0.0;
175#ifdef PLC
176 cputime.plc = 0.0;
177#endif
178
179 /* In the updated code, fragmentation is performed twice;
180 in the first turn a quick fragmentation is performed to locate
181 halos and determine the interesting particles; velocities are not updated;
182 in the second turn the full fragmentation is performed, segmentation is applied
183 and velocities are updated.
184 For the classic fragmentation the first turn is skipped */
185
186#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
187#define START_TURN 1
188#else
189#define START_TURN 0
190 int all_pbc = (subbox.pbc[_x_] && subbox.pbc[_y_] && subbox.pbc[_z_]);
191#endif
192
193 for (int turn = START_TURN; turn < 2; turn++)
194 {
195
196#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
197 if (!turn)
198 {
199
200 /* it creates the map by setting to 1 the well-resolved region */
201 if (!ThisTask)
202 printf("[%s] Creating map of needed particles\n", fdate());
203
204 if (create_map())
205 return 1;
206
207 /* the rest of the first turn is skipped if there are PBCs in all directions */
208 if (all_pbc)
209 continue;
210 }
211 else if (!all_pbc)
212 {
213
214 /* it updates the map by adding spheres around halos in the boundary layer */
215 if (!ThisTask)
216 printf("[%s] Updating map of needed particles\n", fdate());
217
218 update_map(nadd);
219
220 mynadd[0] = nadd[0];
221 mynadd[1] = nadd[1];
222 MPI_Reduce(mynadd, nadd_all, 2, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
223
224 if (!ThisTask)
225 {
226 printf("[%s] Requesting %Ld particles from the boundary layer\n", fdate(), nadd_all[0]);
227 if (nadd_all[1])
228 printf("WARNING: %Ld requested particles lie beyond the boundary layer, some halos may be inaccurate\n", nadd_all[1]);
229 }
230 }
231
232 /* redistribution of products for queried particles */
233 if (!ThisTask)
234 printf("[%s] Starting %s re-distribution of products\n", fdate(), (turn ? "second" : "first"));
235#else
236
237 if (!ThisTask)
238 printf("[%s] Starting re-distribution of products\n", fdate());
239
240#endif
241
242 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
243
244 /* distribution of products from the fft space to the subbox space */
245 map_to_be_used = 0;
246 if (!turn)
247 subbox.Nneeded = 0;
248 if (distribute())
249 return 1;
250
251 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
252 cputime.distr += tmp;
253
254 if (!ThisTask)
255 printf("[%s] Re-distribution of products done, cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), tmp);
256
257#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
258 if (subbox.Nneeded > subbox.Nalloc)
259 {
260 if (turn)
261 {
262 printf("CRITICAL WARNING in Task %d: it allocated %d but received %d particles\n",
263 ThisTask, subbox.Nalloc, subbox.Nneeded);
264 printf("The required overhead is %f\n", (float)subbox.Nneeded / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask);
265 printf("Please increase MaxMemPerParticle by at least %d and start again\n",
266 (int)((float)(subbox.Nneeded - subbox.Nalloc) / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask *
267 (sizeof(product_data) + FRAGFIELDS * sizeof(int))) +
268 1 + (int)params.MaxMemPerParticle);
269 if (params.ExitIfExtraParticles)
270 return 1;
271 }
272 else
273 {
274 printf("ERROR in Task %d: the number of allocated particles (%d) is WAY too small! I need at least %d\n",
275 ThisTask, subbox.Nalloc, subbox.Nneeded);
276 printf("The required overhead is %f\n", (float)subbox.Nneeded / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask);
277 printf("Please increase MaxMemPerParticle to at least %d and start again\n",
278 (int)((float)(subbox.Nneeded - subbox.Nalloc) / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask *
279 (sizeof(product_data) + FRAGFIELDS * sizeof(int))) +
280 1 + (int)params.MaxMemPerParticle);
281 return 1;
282 }
283 }
284
285 /* memory checks on the redistributed particles */
286 mynadd[0] = subbox.Nstored;
287 MPI_Reduce(mynadd, nadd_all, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
288
289 if (!ThisTask)
290 printf("[%s] %s re-distribution of Fmax done, %Ld particles stored by all tasks, average overhead: %f, cputime = %14.6f\n",
291 fdate(), (turn ? "Second" : "First"), nadd_all[0],
292 (float)nadd_all[0] / (float)MyGrids[0].Ntotal, tmp);
293
294 mynadd[0] = subbox.Nstored;
295 MPI_Reduce(mynadd, nadd_all, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_MIN, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
296 MPI_Reduce(mynadd, nadd_all + 1, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_MAX, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
297
298 if (!ThisTask)
299 printf("[%s] Smallest and largest overhead: %f, %f\n", fdate(),
300 (float)nadd_all[0] / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask,
301 (float)nadd_all[1] / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask);
302
303 /* sets or updates the map of potentially loaded particles */
304 if (!turn)
305 for (int i = 0; i < subbox.maplength; i++)
306 frag_map[i] = frag_map_update[i];
307 else
308 for (int i = 0; i < subbox.maplength; i++)
309 frag_map[i] |= frag_map_update[i];
310
311#ifdef DEBUG
312 write_map(turn);
313#endif
314
315 /* this part sorts particles and reorganizes index arrays */
316 sort_and_organize();
317#else
318
319 /* sorting of particles according to their collapse time */
320 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
321 if (!ThisTask)
322 printf("[%s] Starting sorting\n", fdate());
323
324 for (int i = 0; i < subbox.Npart; i++)
325 *(indices + i) = i;
326 qsort((void *)indices, subbox.Npart, sizeof(int), index_compare_F);
327
328 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
329 cputime.sort += tmp;
330 if (!ThisTask)
331 printf("[%s] Sorting done, total cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), tmp);
332
333#endif
334
335 /* counts the number of peaks in the sub-volume to know the number of groups */
336 Npeaks = count_peaks(&Ngood);
337
338 mynadd[0] = Ngood;
339 mynadd[1] = Npeaks;
340 MPI_Reduce(mynadd, nadd_all, 2, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
341
342 if (!ThisTask)
343 {
344 printf("[%s] Task 0 found %d peaks, %d in the well resolved region. Total number of peaks: %Ld\n",
345 fdate(), Npeaks, Ngood, nadd_all[0]);
346 }
347
348 /* the number of peaks was supposed to be at most 1/10 of the number of particles
349(we need space for Npeaks+2 groups) */
350 if (Npeaks + 2 > subbox.PredNpeaks)
351 {
352 printf("ERROR on task %d: the number of peaks %d exceeds the predicted one (%d)\n",
353 ThisTask, Npeaks, subbox.PredNpeaks);
354 printf(" Please increase PredPeakFactor and restart\n");
355 fflush(stdout);
356 return 1;
357 }
358
359 if (turn)
360 {
361 /* Gives the minimal PredPeakFactor */
362 BestPredPeakFactor = (double)nadd_all[1] / (double)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask * 6.0;
363 }
364
365 /* sets arrays to zero */
366 memset(group_ID, 0, subbox.Nalloc * sizeof(int));
367 memset(linking_list, 0, subbox.Nalloc * sizeof(int));
368 memset(groups, 0, subbox.PredNpeaks * sizeof(group_data));
369 memset(wheretoplace_mycat, 0, subbox.PredNpeaks * sizeof(histories_data));
370#ifdef PLC
371 memset(plcgroups, 0, plc.Nmax * sizeof(plcgroup_data));
372#endif
373
374#ifndef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
375 if (!turn)
376 {
377
378 /* quick fragmentation is done in a shot */
379 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
380
381 /* quickly generates the group catalogue */
382 if (quick_build_groups(Npeaks))
383 return 1;
384
385 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
386 cputime.group += tmp;
387 if (!ThisTask)
388 printf("[%s] Quick fragmentation done, cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), tmp);
389 }
390 else
391#endif
392 {
393 /* full fragmentation is done segmenting the redshift interval */
394 for (int mysegment = 0; mysegment < ScaleDep.nseg; mysegment++)
395 {
396 ScaleDep.myseg = mysegment;
397
398#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
399 /* The first segment uses only the first computed velocity
400 The second segment has the two velocities already loaded */
401 if (mysegment >= 1)
402 {
403 /* computation of displacements for the next redshift */
404 if (!ThisTask)
405 printf("\n[%s] Computing displacements for redshift %f\n", fdate(), ScaleDep.z[mysegment]);
406 if (shift_all_displacements())
407 return 1;
408
409#if defined(SCALE_DEPENDENT) || defined(READ_PK_TABLE) || defined(MOD_GRAV_FR)
410 /* Scale-dependent growth: must recompute derivatives via FFTs */
411 if (compute_displacements(0, 0, ScaleDep.z[mysegment]))
412 return 1;
413#else
414 /* Scale-independent growth: reuse base derivatives, rescale fields */
415 if (scale_products_displacements(ScaleDep.z[mysegment - 1], ScaleDep.z[mysegment]))
416 return 1;
417#endif
418
419 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
420 if (!ThisTask)
421 printf("[%s] Starting re-distribution of products\n", fdate());
422
423 map_to_be_used = 1;
424 subbox.Nneeded = 0;
425 if (distribute())
426 return 1;
427 sort_and_organize();
428
429 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
430 cputime.distr += tmp;
431 if (!ThisTask)
432 printf("[%s] Re-distribution of Fmax products done, cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), tmp);
433
434 if (recompute_group_velocities())
435 return 1;
436 }
437#endif
438
439 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
440
441 if (build_groups(Npeaks, ScaleDep.z[mysegment], (mysegment == 0)))
442 return 1;
443
444#ifdef MASS_MAPS
445 /* Orchestrate mass map processing AFTER groups are built so halo membership is known.
446 First segment (mysegment==0) will early-return inside the function. */
447 mass_maps_process_segment(mysegment, ScaleDep.z[mysegment], (mysegment == 0));
448#endif
449
450 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
451 if (!ThisTask)
452 printf("[%s] Fragmentation done to redshift %6.4f, cputime = %14.6f\n",
453 fdate(), ScaleDep.z[mysegment], tmp);
454 cputime.group += tmp;
455 }
456 }
457 }
458
459 /* cpu time for fragmentation */
460 cputime.frag = MPI_Wtime() - cputime.frag;
461
462 if (!ThisTask)
463 printf("[%s] Finishing fragment, total cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), cputime.frag);
464
465#ifdef SNAPSHOT
466 if (params.WriteTimelessSnapshot)
467 {
468 /* redistribution of products */
469 if (!ThisTask)
470 printf("[%s] Starting to distribute back accretion redshifts\n", fdate());
471 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
472
473 if (distribute_back())
474 return 1;
475
476 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
477 cputime.distr += tmp;
478
479 if (!ThisTask)
480 printf("[%s] back-distribution of zacc done, cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), tmp);
481
482 if (write_timeless_snapshot())
483 return 1;
484 }
485#endif
486
487 if (!ThisTask)
488 {
489 printf("\n");
490 printf("[%s] The PredPeakFactor parameter could have been %5.2f in place of %5.2f\n",
491 fdate(), BestPredPeakFactor, params.PredPeakFactor);
492 }
493
494 return 0;
495}
quick_build_groups
int quick_build_groups(int Npeaks)
Definition build_groups.c:1838
build_groups
int build_groups(int Npeaks, double zstop, int first_call)
Definition build_groups.c:65

◆ fragment_driver()

int fragment_driver ( void  )

Definition at line 138 of file fragment.c.

139{
140 /* This routine can be edited to call fragmentation for many combinations
141 of fragment parameters */
142
143 if (!ThisTask)
144 printf("\n[%s] Second part: fragmentation of the collapsed medium\n", fdate());
145
146 /* parameters are assigned in the standard way */
147 set_fragment_parameters(ORDER_FOR_GROUPS);
148
149 /* reallocates the memory */
150 if (reallocate_memory_for_fragmentation())
151 return 1;
152
153 if (fragment())
154 return 1;
155
156 return 0;
157}

866{
867 /* Recompute average displacements of group velocities */
868 int next, npart, i, ia;
869 for (i = FILAMENT + 1; i <= ngroups; i++)
870 if (groups[i].point > 0)
871 {
872 for (ia = 0; ia < 3; ia++)
873 {
874 groups[i].Vel_prev[ia] = groups[i].Vel[ia] = 0;
875#ifdef TWO_LPT
876 groups[i].Vel_prev[ia] = groups[i].Vel_2LPT[ia] = 0.;
877#ifdef THREE_LPT
878 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[ia] = groups[i].Vel_3LPT_1[ia] =
879 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[ia] = groups[i].Vel_3LPT_2[ia] = 0;
880#endif
881#endif
882 }
883
884 next = groups[i].point;
885 for (npart = 0; npart < groups[i].Mass; npart++)
886 {
887 for (ia = 0; ia < 3; ia++)
888 {
889 groups[i].Vel[ia] += frag[next].Vel[ia];
890 groups[i].Vel_prev[ia] += frag[next].Vel_prev[ia];
891#ifdef TWO_LPT
892 groups[i].Vel_2LPT[ia] += frag[next].Vel_2LPT[ia];
893 groups[i].Vel_2LPT_prev[ia] += frag[next].Vel_2LPT_prev[ia];
894#ifdef THREE_LPT
895 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_1[ia] += frag[next].Vel_3LPT_1[ia];
896 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[ia] += frag[next].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[ia];
897 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_2[ia] += frag[next].Vel_3LPT_2[ia];
898 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[ia] += frag[next].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[ia];
899#endif
900#endif
901 }
902 next = linking_list[next];
903 }
904 for (ia = 0; ia < 3; ia++)
905 {
906 groups[i].Vel[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
907 groups[i].Vel_prev[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
908#ifdef TWO_LPT
909 groups[i].Vel_2LPT[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
910 groups[i].Vel_2LPT_prev[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
911#ifdef THREE_LPT
912 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_1[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
913 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
914 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_2[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
915 groups[i].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[ia] /= (double)groups[i].Mass;
916#endif
917#endif
918 }
919 }
920
921 return 0;
922}

)

547{
548 int i, oldf, next, tmp;
549 product_data oldF, tmpF;
550
551 memset(&oldF, 0, sizeof(product_data));
552 memset(&tmpF, 0, sizeof(product_data));
553 for (i = 0; i < n; i++)
554 {
555 if (ind[i] != i)
556 {
557 oldf = frag_pos[i];
558 memcpy(&oldF, &frag[i], sizeof(product_data));
559 next = ind[i];
560 while (next != i)
561 {
562 tmp = frag_pos[next];
563 frag_pos[next] = oldf;
564 oldf = tmp;
565 memcpy(&tmpF, &frag[next], sizeof(product_data));
566 memcpy(&frag[next], &oldF, sizeof(product_data));
567 memcpy(&oldF, &tmpF, sizeof(product_data));
568 tmp = ind[next];
569 ind[next] = next;
570 next = tmp;
571 }
572 frag_pos[i] = oldf;
573 memcpy(&frag[i], &oldF, sizeof(product_data));
574 ind[i] = next;
575 }
576 }

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ set_fragment_parameters()

void set_fragment_parameters ( int  order)

Definition at line 48 of file fragment.c.

49{
50
51#ifndef TWO_LPT
52 order = 1;
53#else
54#ifndef THREE_LPT
55 if (order > 2)
56 order = 2;
57#else
58 if (order > 3)
59 order = 3;
60#endif
61#endif
62
63 /* Parameters for the simulation */
64
65 f_200 = 0.171;
66 switch (order)
67 {
68 case 1:
69#ifdef USE_SIM_PARAMS
70 f_m = f_a = 0.495;
71 f_rm = -0.075;
72 espo = 0.852;
73 f_ra = 0.500;
74#else
75 f_m = f_a = 0.505;
76 f_rm = 0.000;
77 espo = 0.820;
78 f_ra = 0.300;
79#endif
80 sigmaD0 = 1.7;
81 break;
82
83 case 2:
84#ifdef USE_SIM_PARAMS
85 f_m = f_a = 0.475;
86 f_rm = -0.020;
87 espo = 0.780;
88 f_ra = 0.650;
89#else
90 f_m = f_a = 0.501;
91 f_rm = 0.052;
92 espo = 0.745;
93 f_ra = 0.334;
94#endif
95 sigmaD0 = 1.5;
96 break;
97
98 case 3:
99#ifdef USE_SIM_PARAMS
100 f_m = f_a = 0.455;
101 f_rm = 0.000;
102 espo = 0.755;
103 f_ra = 0.700;
104#else
105 f_m = f_a = 0.5024;
106 f_rm = 0.1475;
107 espo = 0.6852;
108 f_ra = 0.4584;
109#endif
110 sigmaD0 = 1.2;
111 break;
112
113 default:
114 break;
115 }
116}
f_a
double f_a

847 /* Shifts all Vel to Vel_prev, at all orders */
848
849 /* This shifts Vel_prev to Vel in the fft space */
850 for (int i = 0; i < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; i++)
851 for (int ia = 0; ia < 3; ia++)
852 {
853 products[i].Vel_prev[ia] = products[i].Vel[ia];

856#ifdef THREE_LPT
857 products[i].Vel_3LPT_1_prev[ia] = products[i].Vel_3LPT_1[ia];
858 products[i].Vel_3LPT_2_prev[ia] = products[i].Vel_3LPT_2[ia];
859#endif
860#endif
861 }
862 return 0;
863}

◆ sort_and_organize()

void sort_and_organize ( void  )

Definition at line 497 of file fragment.c.

498{
499 double tmp;
500 int i;
501
502 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
503 if (!ThisTask)
504 printf("[%s] Starting sorting\n", fdate());
505
506 /* sort particles in order of descending Fmax */
507 for (i = 0; i < subbox.Nstored; i++)
508 *(indices + i) = i;
509 qsort((void *)indices, subbox.Nstored, sizeof(int), index_compare_F);
510
511 /* this is needed to reorder */
512 for (i = 0; i < subbox.Nstored; i++)
513 indicesY[indices[i]] = i;
514
515 /* reorder the frag data structure and frag_pos in order of descending Fmax */
516 reorder(indicesY, subbox.Nstored);
517
518 /* sort particles in order of ascending position */
519 qsort((void *)indices, subbox.Nstored, sizeof(int), index_compare_P);
520 /* create a vector sorted_pos with sorted positions and pointers to it */
521 for (i = 0; i < subbox.Nstored; i++)
522 sorted_pos[i] = frag_pos[i];
523
524 /* reorder the sorted vector */
525 for (i = 0; i < subbox.Nstored; i++)
526 indicesY[indices[i]] = i;
527 reorder_nofrag(indicesY, subbox.Nstored);
528
529 tmp = MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
530 cputime.sort += tmp;
531 if (!ThisTask)
532 printf("[%s] Sorting done, total cputime = %14.6f\n", fdate(), tmp);
533}
reorder_nofrag
void reorder_nofrag(int *, int)

805 FILE *fd = fopen(fname, "w");
806 /* this loop is not following memory... */
807 for (k = 0; k < subbox.Lgwbl[_z_]; k++)
808 {
809 fprintf(fd, "k=%d\n", k);
810 for (j = 0; j < subbox.Lgwbl[_y_]; j++)
811 {
812 for (i = 0; i < subbox.Lgwbl[_x_]; i++)

814 pos = COORD_TO_INDEX(i, j, k, subbox.Lgwbl);
815 // i + (j + k*subbox.Lgwbl[_y_])*subbox.Lgwbl[_x_];
816 rem = pos % UINTLEN;
817 fprintf(fd, "%1d", (frag_map[pos / UINTLEN] & (1 << rem)) >> rem);
818 }
819 fprintf(fd, "\n");
820 }
821 }
822 fclose(fd);
823 sprintf(fname, "mapup_task%d_turn%d.txt", ThisTask, turn);

832 pos = COORD_TO_INDEX(i, j, k, subbox.Lgwbl);
833 // i + (j + k*subbox.Lgwbl[_y_])*subbox.Lgwbl[_x_];

837 fprintf(fd, "\n");

840 fclose(fd);
